Project Support to Dr. Nurseli Yeşim Sünbüloğlu from the Consulate General of Sweden in Istanbul

The project titled “

Training of Trainers Module for the ‘Non-Violent Masculinities’ Phase I”

by

from our Core Program (Common Courses Department) was awarded support by the

Consulate General of Sweden

in Istanbul.

We congratulate Dr. Sünbüloğlu and wish her success in her research.
